from ukrainian_tts.tts import TTS, Voices, Stress
import time

# Initialize TTS
tts = TTS\(device=''cpu''\)

# Test phrase
text = ""Привіт, мене звати Олександр. Дякую, що зателефонували.""

# Test synthesis

with open\(''/tmp/test_ua.wav'', mode=''wb''\) as f:

# Stats

cps = len\(text\) / duration
print\(f''Text: {text}''\)
print\(f''Characters: {len\(text\)}''\)
print\(f''Synthesis time: {duration:.2f}s''\)
print\(f''CPS: {cps:.1f}''\)
print\(f''Saved to: /tmp/test_ua.wav''\)
EOF")

from ukrainian_tts.tts import TTS, Voices, Stress
import time
import wave
import io

# Initialize TTS
tts = TTS\(device=""cpu""\)

# Test phrase
text = ""Привіт, мене звати Олександр. Дякую, що зателефонували.""

# Test synthesis - check what tts\(\) returns
start = time.time\(\)
result = tts.tts\(text, Voices.Dmytro.value, Stress.Dictionary.value\)
end = time.time\(\)

print\(f""Result type: {type\(result\)}""\)
if isinstance\(result, tuple\):
    print\(f""Tuple length: {len\(result\)}""\)
    for i, item in enumerate\(result\):
        print\(f""  [{i}]: type={type\(item\)}, len={len\(item\) if hasattr\(item, ''__len__''\) else ''N/A''}""\)

# Stats
duration = end - start
cps = len\(text\) / duration
print\(f""\\nText: {text}""\)
print\(f""Characters: {len\(text\)}""\)
print\(f""Synthesis time: {duration:.2f}s""\)
print\(f""CPS: {cps:.1f}""\)
EOF")

Bash(ssh root@157.180.42.152 "cd /opt/tts/ukrainian && source venv/bin/activate && python3 << ''EOF''
from ukrainian_tts.tts import TTS, Voices, Stress
import time

# Initialize TTS \(warm up\)
tts = TTS\(device=""cpu""\)

# Warm-up run
_ = tts.tts\(""Тест"", Voices.Dmytro.value, Stress.Dictionary.value\)

# Test phrases
phrases = [
    ""Привіт, мене звати Олександр."",
    ""Будь ласка, зачекайте на лінії."",
    ""Ваш дзвінок дуже важливий для нас."",
    ""Ваш номер замовлення: 7849235."",
]

print\(""\\n=== Ukrainian TTS Benchmark ===""\)
total_chars = 0
total_time = 0

for i, text in enumerate\(phrases\):
    start = time.time\(\)
    audio_io, processed = tts.tts\(text, Voices.Dmytro.value, Stress.Dictionary.value\)
    end = time.time\(\)
    
    duration = end - start
    chars = len\(text\)
    cps = chars / duration
    
    total_chars += chars
    total_time += duration
    
    print\(f""[{i+1}] {text[:40]}...""\)
    print\(f""    Chars: {chars}, Time: {duration:.2f}s, CPS: {cps:.1f}""\)

print\(f""\\n=== TOTAL ===""\)
print\(f""Total chars: {total_chars}""\)
print\(f""Total time: {total_time:.2f}s""\)
print\(f""Average CPS: {total_chars/total_time:.1f}""\)

# Save one sample
audio_io, _ = tts.tts\(""Тестове повідомлення українською мовою."", Voices.Dmytro.value, Stress.Dictionary.value\)
with open\(""/tmp/test_ua.wav"", ""wb""\) as f:
    f.write\(audio_io.read\(\)\)
print\(f""\\nSaved sample to /tmp/test_ua.wav""\)
EOF")

Bash(ssh root@157.180.42.152 "cat > /opt/tts/ukrainian/server.py << ''EOFSERVER''
#!/usr/bin/env python3
""""""
Ukrainian TTS API Server
Endpoint: POST /tts
""""""

from fastapi import FastAPI, HTTPException
from fastapi.responses import Response
from pydantic import BaseModel
from typing import Optional
import time
import io

from ukrainian_tts.tts import TTS, Voices, Stress

app = FastAPI\(
    title=""Ukrainian TTS API"",
    description=""Text-to-Speech API for Ukrainian language"",
    version=""1.0.0""
\)

# Initialize TTS on startup
tts = None

VOICE_MAP = {
    ""dmytro"": Voices.Dmytro.value,
    ""oleksa"": Voices.Oleksa.value,
    ""tetiana"": Voices.Tetiana.value,
    ""lada"": Voices.Lada.value,
    ""mykyta"": Voices.Mykyta.value,
}

STRESS_MAP = {
    ""dictionary"": Stress.Dictionary.value,
    ""model"": Stress.Model.value,
}

class TTSRequest\(BaseModel\):
    text: str
    voice: Optional[str] = ""dmytro""
    stress: Optional[str] = ""dictionary""

class TTSResponse\(BaseModel\):
    text: str
    voice: str
    characters: int
    synthesis_time_ms: float
    cps: float

@app.on_event\(""startup""\)
async def startup_event\(\):
    global tts
    print\(""Loading Ukrainian TTS model...""\)
    tts = TTS\(device=""cpu""\)
    # Warm-up
    tts.tts\(""Тест"", Voices.Dmytro.value, Stress.Dictionary.value\)
    print\(""Model loaded and ready!""\)

@app.get\(""/""\)
async def root\(\):
    return {
        ""service"": ""Ukrainian TTS"",
        ""status"": ""ready"",
        ""voices"": list\(VOICE_MAP.keys\(\)\),
        ""stress_modes"": list\(STRESS_MAP.keys\(\)\),
    }

@app.get\(""/health""\)
async def health\(\):
    return {""status"": ""healthy"", ""model_loaded"": tts is not None}

@app.post\(""/tts""\)
async def synthesize\(request: TTSRequest\):
    if tts is None:
        raise HTTPException\(status_code=503, detail=""Model not loaded""\)
    
    voice = VOICE_MAP.get\(request.voice.lower\(\), Voices.Dmytro.value\)
    stress = STRESS_MAP.get\(request.stress.lower\(\), Stress.Dictionary.value\)
    
    start = time.time\(\)
    audio_io, processed_text = tts.tts\(request.text, voice, stress\)
    end = time.time\(\)
    
    synthesis_time = \(end - start\) * 1000
    cps = len\(request.text\) / \(synthesis_time / 1000\)
    
    audio_bytes = audio_io.read\(\)
    
    return Response\(
        content=audio_bytes,
        media_type=""audio/wav"",
        headers={
            ""X-Text"": request.text[:100],
            ""X-Voice"": request.voice,
            ""X-Characters"": str\(len\(request.text\)\),
            ""X-Synthesis-Time-Ms"": f""{synthesis_time:.2f}"",
            ""X-CPS"": f""{cps:.1f}"",
        }
    \)

@app.post\(""/tts/json""\)
async def synthesize_json\(request: TTSRequest\):
    """"""Returns JSON with base64 audio""""""
    import base64
    
    if tts is None:
        raise HTTPException\(status_code=503, detail=""Model not loaded""\)
    
    voice = VOICE_MAP.get\(request.voice.lower\(\), Voices.Dmytro.value\)
    stress = STRESS_MAP.get\(request.stress.lower\(\), Stress.Dictionary.value\)
    
    start = time.time\(\)
    audio_io, processed_text = tts.tts\(request.text, voice, stress\)
    end = time.time\(\)
    
    synthesis_time = \(end - start\) * 1000
    cps = len\(request.text\) / \(synthesis_time / 1000\)
    
    audio_bytes = audio_io.read\(\)
    audio_b64 = base64.b64encode\(audio_bytes\).decode\(\)
    
    return {
        ""text"": request.text,
        ""processed_text"": processed_text,
        ""voice"": request.voice,
        ""characters"": len\(request.text\),
        ""synthesis_time_ms"": round\(synthesis_time, 2\),
        ""cps"": round\(cps, 1\),
        ""audio_base64"": audio_b64,
        ""audio_format"": ""wav"",
    }

if __name__ == ""__main__"":
    import uvicorn
    uvicorn.run\(app, host=""0.0.0.0"", port=5001\)
EOFSERVER")

Bash(ssh root@157.180.42.152 "cat > /etc/systemd/system/ukrainian-tts.service << ''EOF''
[Unit]
Description=Ukrainian TTS API Server
After=network.target

[Service]
Type=simple
User=root
WorkingDirectory=/opt/tts/ukrainian
Environment=PATH=/opt/tts/ukrainian/venv/bin:/usr/bin
ExecStart=/opt/tts/ukrainian/venv/bin/python /opt/tts/ukrainian/server.py
Restart=always
RestartSec=10

[Install]
WantedBy=multi-user.target
EOF")

import torch, soundfile as sf
from TTS.api import TTS

tts = TTS\(''tts_models/multilingual/multi-dataset/xtts_v2''\).to\(''cuda''\)
spk_file = r''C:\\Users\\izeak\\AppData\\Local\\tts\\tts_models--multilingual--multi-dataset--xtts_v2\\speakers_xtts.pth''

out = tts.synthesizer.tts_model.inference\(
    text=''Hello, this is a test of English speech synthesis.'',
    language=''en'',
    gpt_cond_latent=gpt_cond_latent.to\(''cuda''\),
    speaker_embedding=speaker_embedding_val.to\(''cuda''\),
\)

print\(f''Generated {len\(wav\)} samples''\)
import numpy as np
sf.write\(r''C:\\Users\\izeak\\test_xtts_direct.wav'', np.array\(wav\), 24000\)
print\(''OK - saved test_xtts_direct.wav''\)

Bash("C:\\Users\\izeak\\OneDrive\\Work.Oki-toki\\TTS для Оки-Токи\\xtts_local\\venv\\Scripts\\python.exe" -c "
import torch, time, numpy as np, soundfile as sf

from TTS.tts.configs.xtts_config import XttsConfig
from TTS.tts.models.xtts import Xtts
import os

MODEL_DIR = os.path.join\(os.path.expanduser\(''~''\), ''AppData'', ''Local'', ''tts'', ''tts_models--multilingual--multi-dataset--xtts_v2''\)
SPK_FILE = os.path.join\(MODEL_DIR, ''speakers_xtts.pth''\)

# Load on CPU
print\(''Loading XTTS v2 on CPU...'', flush=True\)
t0 = time.time\(\)
config = XttsConfig\(\)
config.load_json\(os.path.join\(MODEL_DIR, ''config.json''\)\)
model = Xtts.init_from_config\(config\)
model.load_checkpoint\(config, checkpoint_dir=MODEL_DIR\)
# NO .cuda\(\) - stays on CPU
print\(f''Model loaded on CPU in {time.time\(\)-t0:.1f}s'', flush=True\)

spk_data = torch.load\(SPK_FILE, weights_only=True\)
spk = spk_data[''Claribel Dervla'']
gpt_cond_latent = spk[''gpt_cond_latent'']  # stays on CPU
speaker_embedding = spk[''speaker_embedding'']  # stays on CPU

tests = [
    \(''en'', ''Hello, my name is Alexander. How are you today?''\),
    \(''ru'', ''Zdravstvuyte, menya zovut Aleksandr. Kak dela?''\),
    \(''en'', ''Your order number is 7849235. The delivery date is February 15th.''\),
]

print\('''', flush=True\)
print\(''=== CPU Benchmark ==='', flush=True\)
for lang, text in tests:
    t1 = time.time\(\)
    out = model.inference\(text=text, language=lang, gpt_cond_latent=gpt_cond_latent, speaker_embedding=speaker_embedding\)
    gen_time = time.time\(\) - t1
    wav = torch.tensor\(out[''wav'']\).numpy\(\)
    duration = len\(wav\) / 24000
    rtf = gen_time / duration
    cps = len\(text\) / gen_time
    print\(f''[{lang.upper\(\)}] ""{text[:50]}...""'', flush=True\)
    print\(f''  Gen: {gen_time:.1f}s | Audio: {duration:.1f}s | RTF: {rtf:.2f} | CPS: {cps:.1f}'', flush=True\)

# Now GPU for comparison
print\('''', flush=True\)
print\(''=== GPU \(RTX 4060\) Benchmark ==='', flush=True\)
model.cuda\(\)
gpt_cond_latent_gpu = spk[''gpt_cond_latent''].cuda\(\)
speaker_embedding_gpu = spk[''speaker_embedding''].cuda\(\)

for lang, text in tests:
    t1 = time.time\(\)
    out = model.inference\(text=text, language=lang, gpt_cond_latent=gpt_cond_latent_gpu, speaker_embedding=speaker_embedding_gpu\)
    gen_time = time.time\(\) - t1
    wav = torch.tensor\(out[''wav'']\).numpy\(\)
    duration = len\(wav\) / 24000
    rtf = gen_time / duration
    cps = len\(text\) / gen_time
    print\(f''[{lang.upper\(\)}] ""{text[:50]}...""'', flush=True\)
    print\(f''  Gen: {gen_time:.1f}s | Audio: {duration:.1f}s | RTF: {rtf:.2f} | CPS: {cps:.1f}'', flush=True\)
")
